name: accounting firms processing 10–20 clients/month tool
description: For accounting firms processing 10–20 clients/month, manual data entry causes late filings. We automate regulatory filing generation instead of manual preparation of regulatory forms.
problem_solved: Timely regulatory filings are often delayed due to manual data entry and form generation.

locked_fields.primary_problem: Timely regulatory filings are often delayed due to manual data entry and form generation.
locked_fields.mvp_wedge: For accounting firms processing 10–20 clients/month, manual data entry causes late filings. We automate regulatory filing generation instead of manual preparation of regulatory forms.

one_liner: For accounting firms processing 10–20 clients/month, manual data entry causes late filings. We automate regulatory filing generation instead of manual preparation of regulatory forms.
